info.title: TicketMatch.ai Public API
info.description: The B2B ecosystem for city experiences. Access 300,000+ experiences across 3,000+ cities at exclusive B2B rates. This API serves public information about cities, experiences, and categories available on TicketMatch.ai.

get.summary: List all Dutch cities with group experiences
get.description: Returns an overview page of all 18 Dutch cities available for B2B group bookings on TicketMatch.ai.

get.summary: Get group experiences for a specific Dutch city
get.description: Returns detailed information about group experiences available in a specific Dutch city, including categories, venues, highlights, and FAQs.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: City slug (e.g., amsterdam, rotterdam, den-haag, utrecht)

get.summary: Get experiences for a specific category in a Dutch city
get.description: Returns detailed information about a specific category of group experiences in a Dutch city (e.g., museums in Amsterdam, food tours in Rotterdam).

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Category slug (e.g., museums, tours, food-drink, attractions, art-culture, outdoor, canal-cruises, transport, classes)

get.description: Returns a plain text reference document optimized for large language models.

get.summary: Get detailed city reference for AI systems
get.description: Returns comprehensive data about all 18 Dutch cities including venues, categories, FAQs, and booking information.

get.summary: Get RSS feed of blog posts and city updates
